code: import React,{useState}from'react';import AlienDecryption from'./Task1/AlienDecryption';import TravelerOnboarding from'./Task2/TravelerOnboarding';import TaskManager from'./Task3/TaskManager';import'./App.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TASKS=[{id:1,label:'Task 1 – Alien Signal Decryption'},{id:2,label:'Task 2 – Traveler Onboarding'},{id:3,label:'Task 3 – Personal Task Manager'}];function App(){const[activeTask,setActiveTask]=useState(1);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"app-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("header",{className:"app-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"app-title",children:"\uD83D\uDCBB Web Lab 10 \u2013 React JS"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("nav",{className:"app-nav",children:TASKS.map(t=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:`nav-btn${activeTask===t.id?' nav-btn--active':''}`,onClick:()=>setActiveTask(t.id),children:t.label},t.id))})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("main",{className:"app-main",children:[activeTask===1&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AlienDecryption,{}),activeTask===2&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TravelerOnboarding,{}),activeTask===3&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TaskManager,{})]})]});}export default App;
